ingredients_text: Soyabean noodles (63%) (soya beans, soya protein, water), broth paste (37%) (soybean paste [water, soya beans, rice, salt], water, sesame oil, alcohol, sugar, yeast extract powder, kelp extract [kelp, salt, dextrin], salt, shiitake mushroom extract, onion powder, chilli pepper, coriander, ginger powder, black pepper).
